MissionConservationBlockchains

Not available to individuals from the US and other select countries.

Verify wallet.
Convert points.
To huge $EVERY rewards

Everyworld is a game, and you can be its winner.

Play Everyworld on Discord.

Get started.

Play the Everyworld game on Discord.

Access Everyworld through Discord via web browser, mobile app, or desktop app. Ensure you have a verified Discord account before joining the Everyworld Discord server.

Get Started

Open Discord and locate the server list on the left-hand sidebar.
Press the + button at Open Discord and locate the server list on the left-hand sidebar.

In the pop-up window, click the “Join a Server” button.
Paste or type the following URL: discord.gg/everyworld and press Join.

HOW IT WORKS

Earned points are automatically entered into a regularly-scheduled drawing.

Token holders can also enter token drawings.

01

Earn points by referring friends and engaging with content on Discord.

Digital engagement contributes
to a greener tomorrow.

Everyworld converts everyday activities into financial contributions to environmental conservation organizations, with the goal of creating a scalable, decentralized social media/martech platform.

02

A weekly on chain drawing with one winner.

Provably fair, on-chain drawings.

You're already doing it. Get rewarded for it.

03

Individuals win, and so does the planet.

Matching contributions are made to conservation organizations.
‍

Ecosystem economic equilibrium is maintained through the following rewards payout ratio:
- 40% for the individual winner*
- 40% for the conservation organizations
- *10% for referral rewards  
- 10% are burned (when payouts are in tokens)
-Rewards unlock in equal monthly installments over 3 years.

*Contributions will take the form of points or, if and when applicable, tokens.

It’s a win-win-win

Your participation can make an impact.

Turn everyday digital activity into rewards for both you and the planet.

Get Started

Play Everyworld on Discord.

Everyworld is not available to individuals from the US and other select countries.

Residents of the United States are ineligible to participate in Everyworld. In addition, residents of the following countries are also ineligible: Afghanistan, Australia, Belgium, Belize, Bolivia, Canada (province of Quebec), Cambodia, Chad, China, Columbia, Cuba, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Libya, Myanmar, North Korea, Pakistan, Singapore, Somalia, Sudan, Syria, Tanzania, Thailand, Turkey and where otherwise prohibited by law. If you are a resident of one of these countries, do NOT enter a Drawing, since the Drawings are NOT intended for you.

You must be 18 years or older (20 years or older in Japan) to participate in Everyworld.

Residents of these countries or individuals physically located in these countries are prohibited from collecting any payouts. For the avoidance of doubt, use of the Services is void where prohibited by law.

Everyworld reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to condition the awarding/distribution of $EVERY upon the passing of its Know Your Customer (“KYC”) process.
